title: Rebuild Fresh Dabbawala Multi-Tenant PWA with Complete Features

requirements.summary: Rebuild multi-tenant PWA architecture with four standalone apps (Customer, Delivery, Restaurant, Admin) that can be detected and launched based on URL parameters, subdomains, or paths
acceptanceCriteria: App.tsx correctly detects and routes to customer, delivery, restaurant, or admin apps
Each app has its own standalone entry point component
URL parameter detection and session storage management works correctly
App directory page displays all four apps with launch buttons

file_operations.description: Verify and update app type detection logic to support URL parameters (?app=customer/delivery/restaurant/admin), subdomain detection, and path-based routing. Ensure dynamic PWA manifest switching based on detected app type. Update session storage management for app persistence.
Verify customer app entry point handles authentication flow, profile setup, service worker registration, and renders customer interface with proper loading states
Verify delivery partner app entry point handles authentication flow, profile setup, service worker registration, and renders delivery interface with proper loading states
Verify restaurant partner app entry point handles authentication flow, profile setup, service worker registration, and renders restaurant interface with proper loading states
Verify admin app entry point handles authentication flow, profile setup, service worker registration, and renders admin interface with proper loading states

Verify app directory displays all four Fresh ecosystem apps (Customer, Delivery, Restaurant, Admin) with descriptions, features, icons using generated images (frontend/public/assets/generated/customer-app-icon-transparent.dim_192x192.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/delivery-app-icon-transparent.dim_192x192.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/restaurant-app-icon-transparent.dim_192x192.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/admin-app-icon-transparent.dim_192x192.png), and install/launch buttons

requirements.summary: Rebuild authentication system supporting Internet Identity and OTP login (email and phone) for all four app types with profile setup flows
acceptanceCriteria: Login prompts support Internet Identity, email OTP, and phone OTP for each app type
Phone OTP validates Indian phone numbers
Profile setup flows collect appropriate information for each user type
Session persistence works across page refreshes
OTP resend functionality with expiry handling

file_operations.description: Verify Internet Identity authentication hook manages login state, identity persistence, delegation validation, and provides clear/logout functionality. Use the authorization component's authentication system with role-based access control.

Verify OTP authentication hook manages send, verify, and resend operations for both email and phone OTP with session persistence in localStorage, expiry handling, and authentication state management using backend sendEmailOtp, verifyEmailOtp, sendPhoneOtp, verifyPhoneOtp methods

Verify multi-tab login component supports Internet Identity, email OTP, and phone OTP (Indian numbers only) with validation, resend logic, and toast notifications. Use authorization component's authentication patterns.
Verify delivery partner login component supports Internet Identity, email OTP, and phone OTP (Indian numbers only) with verification code handling and proper error states
Verify restaurant partner login component with tabbed interface supports Internet Identity, email OTP, and phone OTP (Indian numbers only) with validation and toast notifications

Verify admin login component with tabbed interface supports Internet Identity, email OTP, and phone OTP (Indian numbers only) with OTP sending, verification, resending with validation, and error messages

Verify customer onboarding form collects name and address, sequentially calls useSaveCallerUserProfile (from authorization component) and useCreateCustomerProfile mutations with loading states and error handling
Verify delivery partner profile form collects name and creates both user profile (using authorization component's saveCallerUserProfile) and delivery-specific profile via mutations

Verify restaurant profile form collects name, description, and operating hours, then saves both user profile (using authorization component's saveCallerUserProfile) and restaurant-specific profile via mutations
Verify admin profile setup form collects name and saves profile using authorization component's saveCallerUserProfile mutation with validation and loading states

Verify React Query hooks for user profiles use authorization component's getCallerUserProfile and saveCallerUserProfile backend methods. Ensure proper integration with OTP authentication hooks for email/phone linking using linkEmailToProfile and linkPhoneToProfile backend methods.

requirements.summary: Rebuild customer app features including meal browsing, subscription ordering, dabba booking flow with pickup/drop addresses and time slots, order history, and booking management
acceptanceCriteria: Customer can browse meals and place subscription orders
Multi-step dabba booking flow collects addresses, time slots, and frequency
Order history displays with status badges and review submission
Booking view shows active bookings with cancel functionality
Home page displays booking and order summaries with lazy loading

file_operations.description: Verify customer home page displays booking and order summaries with lazy-loaded views for creating bookings, meal plans, and viewing bookings/orders. Include background prefetching for performance. Use frontend/public/assets/generated/fresh-logo.dim_200x200.png for branding.

Verify multi-step flow component for browsing meals, selecting subscription types, specifying quantities, and placing orders with loading and empty states. Display meal images using frontend/public/assets/generated/sample-meal.dim_400x300.jpg as placeholder/fallback.
Verify multi-step booking flow component for dabba pickup service collects pickup/drop addresses, time slots, and subscription frequency, then submits via useCreateDabbaBooking mutation
Verify customer order history view displays order details with status badges and allows users to submit reviews for delivered orders using proper React Query hooks
Verify customer dabba pickup bookings display with details (addresses, time slots, frequency), status badges, and cancel functionality using React Query hooks
Verify React Query hooks for meals, orders, reviews, dabba bookings, and subscriptions with backend actor integration and localStorage fallback for offline support

requirements.summary: Rebuild restaurant partner app with meal management (create, edit, image upload), order viewing, and revenue tracking dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Restaurant can create and edit meals with image uploads
Order list displays incoming orders with details
Revenue tracking shows earnings from orders
Meal images are prefetched for performance

file_operations.description: Verify restaurant partner dashboard for managing meals (create, edit, upload images using blob-storage component) and viewing orders with revenue tracking. Use the blob-storage component to handle meal image uploads: create ExternalBlob instances from uploaded files using ExternalBlob.fromBytes(), track upload progress with withUploadProgress(), and display images using getDirectURL() for streaming and caching. Include lazy loading and image prefetching. Display hero image using frontend/public/assets/generated/restaurant-hero.dim_800x600.jpg. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

Verify React Query hooks for restaurant profiles, meals, and orders with proper mutation invalidation. Ensure meal image handling integrates with blob-storage component's ExternalBlob type for upload and display operations.

requirements.summary: Rebuild delivery partner app with availability toggle, assigned orders and bookings dashboard, status update controls, and earnings tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Delivery partner can toggle availability status
Dashboard shows assigned meal orders and dabba bookings
Status updates can be applied to deliveries
Earnings are tracked and displayed
Separate tabs for meal orders and dabba bookings

file_operations.description: Verify delivery partner dashboard for managing availability status, viewing assigned orders and dabba bookings, and updating delivery statuses with earnings tracking. Display hero image using frontend/public/assets/generated/delivery-hero.dim_800x600.jpg.
Verify delivery executive portal page with availability toggle, active deliveries dashboard, and tabs for managing meal orders and dabba bookings with status updates
Verify React Query hooks for delivery partners with mutations for availability toggle, status updates, and earnings tracking with proper cache invalidation

requirements.summary: Rebuild admin app with statistics dashboard, management interfaces for customers, restaurants, delivery partners, and orders with CSV export functionality, plus Twilio configuration panel
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard displays key statistics
Management tables show customers, restaurants, delivery partners, and orders
CSV export functionality works for all data types
Twilio configuration panel allows setting up SMS credentials
All data tables are searchable and sortable

file_operations.description: Verify admin dashboard displays statistics and management interfaces for customers, restaurants, delivery partners, and orders with CSV export functionality and Twilio configuration. Use the authorization component to restrict access (admin-only). Display hero image using frontend/public/assets/generated/admin-dashboard.dim_800x600.jpg.

Verify admin configuration component for setting up Twilio SMS credentials (account SID, auth token, phone number) using backend setTwilioConfiguration and isTwilioConfigured methods to enable phone OTP login across all Fresh apps
Verify React Query hooks for admin operations including Twilio configuration management, user management, and data export functionality with proper authorization checks

Verify application header displays logo using frontend/public/assets/generated/fresh-logo.dim_200x200.png, user role (customer/admin/delivery/restaurant), and dropdown menu with user profile and logout functionality using authorization component's authentication state

requirements.summary: Rebuild PWA functionality with app-specific manifests for each tenant, service worker with aggressive caching strategies, install prompts, and offline support
acceptanceCriteria: Each app type has its own PWA manifest with appropriate theme colors
Service worker implements versioned cache management for static, runtime, images, API, and fonts
Install prompts appear for first-time users
Apps work offline with cached data
Performance monitoring tracks Core Web Vitals

file_operations.description: Verify PWA manifest for Fresh Customer app with branding, icons (using frontend/public/assets/generated/customer-app-icon-transparent.dim_192x192.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/customer-app-icon-transparent.dim_512x512.png), theme colors (green #10b981), and metadata for home-cooked meal delivery and dabba pickup services

Verify PWA manifest for Fresh Delivery partner app with blue theme (#3b82f6), icons (using frontend/public/assets/generated/delivery-app-icon-transparent.dim_192x192.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/delivery-app-icon-transparent.dim_512x512.png), and metadata for delivery management and earnings tracking

Verify PWA manifest for restaurant partner portal app with orange theme, icons (using frontend/public/assets/generated/restaurant-app-icon-transparent.dim_192x192.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/restaurant-app-icon-transparent.dim_512x512.png), and display settings for mobile installation

Verify PWA manifest for admin app with slate theme color, admin-specific icons (using frontend/public/assets/generated/admin-app-icon-transparent.dim_192x192.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/admin-app-icon-transparent.dim_512x512.png), and business/productivity categories

Verify service worker implements aggressive caching strategies with versioned cache management, precaching critical assets, and handling different cache types (static, runtime, images, API, fonts, prefetch) with size limits and expiration for offline support
Verify PWA install prompt component detects beforeinstallprompt events and displays dismissible card encouraging users to install the app with app-type-specific styling

Verify first-time PWA installation prompt component detects installability, handles beforeinstallprompt event, and guides users to install. Skip automatically if already installed or previously seen in session
Verify PWA-optimized HTML entry point with inline critical CSS, performance monitoring scripts, preloaded assets, and Web Vitals tracking for instant first paint and progressive enhancement
Verify performance monitoring utilities for marking milestones, measuring durations, tracking Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS, FCP, TTFB), and logging startup metrics with ratings

requirements.summary: Rebuild theming system with OKLCH color schemes for each app variant (customer green, delivery blue, restaurant orange, admin slate) with light/dark mode support using Tailwind CSS
acceptanceCriteria: Each app type uses its designated color scheme
CSS custom properties define theme colors with OKLCH
Light and dark modes are supported
Shadcn UI components integrate with theme system
Theme colors persist across navigation

file_operations.description: Verify global CSS defines Tailwind layers and CSS custom properties for theming including color schemes for customer (fresh/green), delivery (blue), restaurant (orange), and admin (slate) apps with light/dark mode support using OKLCH color system
Verify Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining theme colors for multiple app variants (fresh, delivery, restaurant, admin) plus shadcn/ui design tokens and custom animations

requirements.summary: Rebuild React Query integration with hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, meals, orders, reviews, bookings, subscriptions, delivery partners, and restaurant profiles with localStorage fallback
acceptanceCriteria: All backend queries and mutations use React Query hooks
Data invalidation works correctly after mutations
localStorage provides fallback for offline scenarios
Loading and error states are properly handled
Actor instance management integrates with Internet Identity state

file_operations.description: Verify React Query hook creates and manages backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state from authorization component, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes. Ensure integration with authorization component's authentication initialization.

Verify comprehensive React Query hooks for all backend operations: user profiles (using authorization component's getCallerUserProfile/saveCallerUserProfile), OTP authentication (email/phone using linkEmailToProfile/linkPhoneToProfile), meals, orders, reviews, dabba bookings, subscriptions, delivery partners, and restaurant profiles with backend actor integration and localStorage fallback for offline support. Ensure proper query invalidation after mutations.
Verify application entry point sets up React Query client, Internet Identity provider (from authorization component), and renders root App component with necessary context providers

Verify TypeScript type definitions for frontend data structures including UserProfile, Meal, Order, CustomerProfile, RestaurantProfile, DeliveryPartner, Review, DabbaBooking, and various enums for order status, delivery status, subscription types, and pickup slots match backend interface
